key_finding: Pipeline PASS; scores non-degenerate (spread=0.426); but direction unexpected (high-abs SAEs score higher). Critical confound: layer depth not controlled. Full experiment must fix layer for matched comparison.
risks_identified: Layer depth confound: low vs high absorption groups differ in layer (8 vs 4-6)
RAVEL proxy metric may not capture intended downstream quality
H3 direction inverted in pilot - needs investigation with proper same-layer matching
